creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Etisalat MOTB is finally open! For its 10th season, this cool DSF Market has popped up at the trendy @D3Dubai! 💕

It’s a shopping destination with amazing retail shops, a foodie venue with 25 F&B stalls, and an exciting entertainment zone with fun activities and live performances.

🗓️ January 19-29, 2023

Plan your visit now! Tag your family and friends! 💕

@celebratedubai @styledbydubai @etisalatuae @d3dubai #mydsf #visitDubai
